---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for LegacyMCP Core
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: Marco-Lelli
---

## Summary
A clear description of the feature you are proposing.

## Use case
What problem does this solve? What scenario does it enable?

## Scope check
Before submitting, please review the [Core vs Enterprise scope](../../blob/master/README.md#what-it-covers).
Features that fall within the Enterprise layer are not accepted in this repository.

## Proposed implementation
Optional — if you have ideas on how this could be implemented.

## Additional context
Any other context, screenshots, or references.
